titleStmt.title: SII 5.645: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 645. (A.R. No. 85 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pū maruviya puvi yeḻum puvi cūḻn
ta porup peḻun taṉṉiḻal maruviya taṉi veṇ
kuṭai nīṭuḻikaḷ nilāp parappak koṭāta
taṉic ceṅkol koḷkai cāṉṟa vaṟu
camaiyamum vāṭāta vaimpūtaṅkaḷum maṟai nāṉ
kum muttamiḻu marupiṟappino ṭorumutalāy varu nāṇamum kaḷi
kkaṟiyum paruva māriyum palaviḷaivum paḻutiṉṟi muḻutumākak kaṭaliṭai ye
ḻucuṭa raṉṉan taṉṉaparaviroḷi yaṭalāḻi mānilattuk kaṇṭakare
ṉum valliruḷ mutalaṟa veṟintiṭ ṭeyti maṉṉavaṟ kiṭiyurumo
t tetticaiyilu maṟṟulāva porupuliyum pulvāyu morutuṟai
nī ruṭaṉuṇṇa Uḷveruvuṟ ṟuṭal naṭuṅkum puḷḷu māvu muṭaṉ
puṇarntu kaṭuṅkulaiñar kurampainiḻa liṭumpaiyiṉṟi
yiṉitu vaika maṟantalainiṉ ṟoruva roruvarai yiṟan talai
yuṟā tiṉitoḻukap perumpulavaru maruṅkaviñaru nāppuṟu na
llicaip pāṇarum koṭiyavaruṅ kuyilavaru nāṭunāṭuceṉ
ṟiravalarā yiṭumpai niṅkip puravalarāyp pukaḻpaṭaippac celaveṉa
t teṉṉavaruñ cilaiyāṉaic ceralaru māliyāṉaik kāliṅkarum varā
kakkoṭi vaṭaviraṭṭarum veḻikkoṭi viṟalventarum viṇaikko
ṭic ciṅkaḷarum pāḻippaṭaip paṟamaṉṉarum maṇiniṟaivoṭu kaḻa
laip poṉṉār tanta taṉittaṇṭil
tanmappuli taḻaittoṅka nāmātu ciṟa
ntoṅka tirumuḻutu nayantu vulkap pū
mātu tirumārviṟ poli veyti viṟṟiruppat tirumaṭa
ntai yeṇṭicai viḷaṅka tiruppuyameṉṉum porup
piraṇṭiṉum pormaṭantai nilamaṭantaiyum piriyātu puṇarn
tiruppap perunāṇmutaṟkum piṟappuṭaṉ muṉ muṉṟula kettavaru nāyaki
tirumaṭantaiyum paṭitoṟku mātarmaiññaiyum pirutikulan taṉi viḷaṅkap
pārileḻu cantirotaiyam tiruvāṇai vuṭa nāṇai ticai naṭāttun tiyākaval
li kalakaveṅkatir maṇimuṭi kavittup puvaṉa naṟuntuṇai pū
ṅkompu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷum puruntaṉaiya peruṅkaṟpil malāṭa kulamaṇi
viḷakkut tiruntu nittila(ta) maṇimuṟuvaṟ terivai mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷum
Ūḻiyūḻi piriyātu vāḻi maṇampuṇarn tiruppac cempoṉ virasiṁndāsa
ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecari
patma rāṉa tri puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku
yāṇṭu 2Āvatu taṉunāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum tiṅ
kaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attatti ṉāḷ vaṭakarai Irājarāja
vaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyāṟku
Uttuṅkatuṅkavaḷanāṭṭuk kunṟakkūṟṟattu Iraikkuṭi Iraikkuṭai
yāṉ Iṭaiyaṉ Arikaṇṭatevaṉ Ulaka
ḷantāṉ Atikaināyakaṉ vaitta tirunu
ntāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Iravu pakal Eriya nāḷ Oṉṟukku ney Uḻak
kāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatukku ney toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻikku viṭṭa cāvā
muvāc cevvari Āṭu toṇṇūṟum takark kiṭāy Oṉṟum viṭṭu Ivai kaik
koṇṭu celuttakkaṭava tirununtāviḷakkukkuṭi Iṭaiyaril Araṅkaṉ vaiyicci
yanātaṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum tiruvāykkulan tiru
maḻuvāṭi viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum Aracu cūṟṟi viḷak
ku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum Uṭaiyāṉ kaṇavati viḷakku Arai
kkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟekālum Aravaṇai tāḻi viḷakku mākāṇikku Āṭu Aiñ
caraiye Araikkālum tiruvaraṅkaṉ tūṇaṉ mākāṇikku Āṭu Aiñcarai
ye Araikkālum tirumaḻuvāṭi kūttaṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉ
ṟe kālum kaṇṇan periyāṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟe kālum
māṇikkaṉ kūttaṉ viḷakku Araikkālukku Āṭu patinoṉṟekālum Āka viḷakku
oṉṟukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu toṇṇūṟum takark kiṭāy Oṉṟuṅ kaikko
ṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟaṟupattunālu mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku ney Uḻakkāka can
tirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomānom Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmā
he ppaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ikkoyiṟ civabrahma ṇakkāṇiyuṭaiya tevakan
mi tu
mi kavuśya n neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāṉa co
ḷentiraciṅkapaṭṭaneṉ Ip Ikkoyiṟkaṇakka kāṇiyuṭaiya
neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ paṭṭālakan Ainna ḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyāṉāṉa tiruvuṇāḻikai
ppiriyane ḻanilāy Uṭaiyāṉ karuū
ḻāṉ taṇṭeśvara nampi Eḻuttu Elampakkiḻān Īraṭivatta
rāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koyiṟkaṇakku neṟkuppai Uṭaiyāṉ Āḷuṭai
yāṉ Ārāamutāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira piriyan Eḻuttu
Ivaṉ Iṭṭa tarāk kuttiviḷakku 1- nāl niṟai 2 100 6 10 2
Digital edition of SII 5.645 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
